name: stripe-billing
description: Stripe Billing tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: search_customers
tools.description: Search Stripe customers by email or name.

tools.name: create_subscription
tools.description: Subscribe a customer to a price/plan.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List recent invoices for a customer.

tools.name: create_checkout_session
tools.description: Generate a Stripe Checkout URL for a price.

tools.name: get_revenue_metrics
tools.description: Calculate MRR, ARR, churn rate, and LTV from live Stripe data.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get current Stripe account balance and recent payouts.
